name: High-Ankle Safety Boots
shortDescription: High-ankle boot with steel toe and midsole for uneven site terrain.
longDescription: High-ankle boots add ankle support over loose, uneven or elevated terrain — construction sites, scrapyards and outdoor plant areas — while keeping the same steel toe and puncture-resistant midsole protection as our standard safety shoe range.

images.alt: High-Ankle Safety Boots supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
